description.ko: 빛과 데이터가 하나가 되어 미래 도시의 우울한 영혼을 반영하는, 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 거대 도시의 풍경입니다.
description.en: A rain-drenched cyberpunk megacity where light and data become one, reflecting the melancholic soul of a futuristic metropolis.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Cyan Zenith.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams. A torrential downpour transforms into glowing data pixels upon hitting the wet metallic asphalt, creating ray-traced puddle reflections. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures and flickering lens flares. 8k resolution, capturing the urban romanticism.
